nasb.text: So Jesus said to them again, “Truly, truly, I say to you, I am the door of the sheep.

esv.text: So Jesus again said to them, “Truly, truly, I say to you, I am the door of the sheep.

cnv.text: 於是耶穌又說：“我實實在在告訴你們，我就是羊的門。

ccb.text: 于是祂又说：“我实实在在地告诉你们，我就是羊的门。

csbs.text: 因此耶稣又说：“我确确实实地告诉你们：我就是羊的门。
